title: The Punjab Disturbed Areas Act, 1983
full_text: The Punjab Disturbed Areas Act, 1983 पंजाब विक्षुब्ध क्षेत्र अधिनियम, 1983 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198332 Act Number: 32 Enactment Date: 1983-12-08 Act Year: 1983 Short Title: The Punjab Disturbed Areas Act, 1983 Hindi Title: पंजाब विक्षुब्ध क्षेत्र अधिनियम, 1983 Long Title: An Act to make better provision for the suppression of disorder and for the restoration and maintenance of public order in disturbed areas in Punjab. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 07-10-1983 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Punjab Disturbed Areas Act, 1983 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Powers to declare areas to be disturbed areas. Section 4. Power to fire upon persons contravening certain orders. Section 5. Powers to destroy arms dump, fortified positions, etc. Section 6. Protection of persons acting under sections 4 and 5. Section 7. Repeal and saving.
